title: New Day Surgery Unit Now Open
text: Our new 12-theatre day surgery unit is now open. Shorter waiting times for many procedures.

title: Car Park Changes from 1 April
text: Car park charges are changing from 1 April 2024. Blue Badge holders remain free of charge.

title: Hospital App: Manage Your Appointment
text: Download the hospital app to view your appointments and receive test results.

title: Free Patient Wi-Fi Now Available
text: Free unlimited Wi-Fi is now available throughout the hospital for patients and visitors.

title: Important: What to Bring to Your Appointment
text: Please remember to bring a list of all your current medications to every appointment.
